2. Kevin McHale: 70.5%

items.title: The thing about the Aces, as this season goes on they are delivering problems and solving them as well. Jackie Young have a great game so now you run a stagger for Bell, have Young pass and cut off two screens. Gets a trap and A'ja Wilson rolls. That forces help and Smith open

items.title: May 31, 1998: Chicago's Scottie Pippen drives and scores with two minutes to go in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference Finals against Indiana.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 31, 1998: Chicago's Scottie Pippen drives and scores with two minutes to go in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference Finals against Indiana.

Pippen had 17 PTS/12 REB/2 STL and Michael Jordan had 28 PTS/9 REB/8 AST in the Bulls' 88-83 win. The Pacers' Reggie Miller scored 22 PTS.
